name: Heavy Torpedo
abilityText: Consume 1 Ammo. Deal 22 damage.
flavor: One shot. One kill. If you're lucky.

name: Unstable Warhead
abilityText: Deal 28 damage. 20% chance to take 6 self-damage.
flavor: Loaded with something that shouldn't exist. Fire and pray.

name: Flak Warhead
abilityText: Tracking Lock. Deal 6 damage. +10 bonus vs drones.
flavor: Not designed for ships. Designed for what ships deploy.

name: Guided Missile
abilityText: Consume 1 Ammo. Deal 12 damage. Apply Lock.
flavor: Fire. Forget. It remembers.

name: Thermal Breach
abilityText: Deal 4 damage. Apply Burn (4 damage for 2 turns).
flavor: Melt through the outer layer. Let the heat do the rest.

name: EMP Spike
abilityText: Deal 10 damage. Enemy loses next action.
flavor: A surge so violent it stops thoughts.

name: Signal Jam
abilityText: Deal 3 damage. Apply Jam.
flavor: Static drowns everything. Including your plans.

name: Grapple Lock
abilityText: Deal 4 damage. Apply Lock.
flavor: Mag-clamps engage. You're going nowhere.

name: Null Field
abilityText: Deal 6 damage. Disable 1 enemy module for 2 turns.
flavor: A dead zone where technology forgets how to work.

name: System Ping
abilityText: Deal 2 damage. Reveal enemy's next action.
flavor: Tap the hull. Listen to what echoes back.

name: Cascade Overload
abilityText: Deal 14 damage. If target has 2+ statuses, enemy loses next action.
flavor: System after system cascading into silence.

name: Elite Hunter
abilityText: Deal 14 damage. +6 vs Elite/Boss enemies.
flavor: Specialized rounds for specialized targets.

name: Dual Lock Salvo
abilityText: Deal 8 damage to 2 targets. Apply Lock to both.
flavor: Two locks. Two kills. One trigger pull.

name: Proximity Mine
abilityText: Place a mine. When enemy attacks, deal 12 damage.
flavor: Patience. Proximity. Punishment.

name: Heat Injector
abilityText: Deal 6 damage. Enemy takes 2 self-damage each time they play a Weapon this turn.
flavor: Cook them from the inside out.

name: Paint Target
abilityText: Deal 3 damage. Apply Drone Mark and Expose.
flavor: Lit up like a bonfire. Every drone in range knows.

name: Polarity Flip
abilityText: Transfer 8 Block from enemy to yourself.
flavor: Their shield is now your shield. Physics doesn't care about ownership.

name: Energy Siphon
abilityText: Deal 6 damage. Enemy -1 energy next turn. You +1 energy next turn.
flavor: Steal the spark. Leave them cold.

name: Hazard Pulse
abilityText: Deal 6 damage to all enemies.
flavor: A broadcast of pain on all frequencies.

name: Catastrophic Strike
abilityText: Deal 32 damage. Apply Burn and Expose. Exhaust.
flavor: The kind of hit that turns warships into debris fields.

name: Singularity Cannon
abilityText: Critical Breach — Destroy all enemy drones and Block. Deal 40 damage. Once per game. Exhaust.
flavor: It doesn't fire projectiles. It fires the absence of everything.

name: Blink Strike
abilityText: Deal 10 damage. Evade next attack. Exhaust.
flavor: There. Gone. Damage dealt. Deal with it.

name: Chaff Torpedo
abilityText: Deal 8 damage. Add 2 Noise cards to enemy deck.
flavor: Debris on the hull. Debris in the databanks.

name: IFF Scrambler
abilityText: Deal 8 damage. Enemy's next attack hits a random target (may hit self).
flavor: Friend? Foe? Does it matter when nothing can tell?

name: Berserker Round
abilityText: Deal 5 damage. +2 damage for each turn elapsed this combat.
flavor: It gets angrier the longer you wait.

name: Purge Protocol
abilityText: Remove all statuses from self. Gain 8 Block per status removed.
flavor: Cleanse the system. Convert the infection into armor.

name: Shield Recharge
abilityText: If you were not hit last turn, gain 10 Block.
flavor: Undisturbed shields rebuild stronger than before.

name: Shield Drone
abilityText: Deploy drone: +4 Block each turn for 3 turns.
flavor: A tiny guardian in permanent orbit around your cockpit.

name: Point Defense
abilityText: Negate the next missile or projectile attack.
flavor: Click. Track. Intercept. Click.

name: Signal Denial
abilityText: Cancel the next enemy Weapon card.
flavor: Their trigger pull echoes into nothing.

name: Spoof Flare
abilityText: Redirect the next hit to one of your drones.
flavor: The flare burns bright. The missile follows.

name: Escort Screen
abilityText: Gain 5 Block. Redirect the next hit targeting an ally to self.
flavor: Get behind me. I've got plating to spare.

name: Threat Spoof
abilityText: Force enemy to target one of your drones instead of your ship.
flavor: Make the drone look important. Make yourself look invisible.

name: Digital Firewall
abilityText: Negate the next Jam applied to you. Gain Shielded. Draw 1.
flavor: Hardened code. No exceptions. No exploits.

name: Stealth Mask
abilityText: Gain Stealth Coating for 2 turns against enemy hack/ECM effects.
flavor: Ghost protocol engaged. Good luck finding what isn't there.

name: Harmonic Barrier
abilityText: Gain 12 Block. While this Block remains, gaining more Block cleanses 1 status.
flavor: The shield sings. The corruption retreats.

name: Shield Breaker Protocol
abilityText: Gain 8 Block. Remove Shielded from enemy.
flavor: Their invulnerability has a frequency. This card found it.

name: Capacitor Hold
abilityText: Retain 1 unused energy this turn (max 2 stored). Exhaust.
flavor: Bank it. Save it. Spend it when it matters.

name: Temporal Loop
abilityText: Undo all damage taken last turn. Restore hull to last turn's value. Once per game. Exhaust.
flavor: Time bends. The wound unravels. You were never hit.

name: Reinforced Plating
abilityText: Gain 4 Block. All Block gained this turn is increased by 30%.
flavor: Thicker plating for when you know what's coming.

name: Timing Override
abilityText: Gain Priority Fire next turn.
flavor: Rewrite the queue. Move when they don't expect it.

name: Warp Blink
abilityText: Negate the next hit this turn. Exhaust.
flavor: One microsecond in another dimension. One hit avoided.

name: Boost Thrusters
abilityText: Next Maneuver card costs 0 this turn.
flavor: All power to engines. Questions later.

name: True Aim
abilityText: Next attack cannot miss or be evaded.
flavor: The targeting computer doesn't know what 'miss' means.

name: Combat Mode Swap
abilityText: Toggle ship mode: Assault (+3 weapon damage, -3 Block) or Guard (+5 Block, -2 weapon damage). Persists.
flavor: Pick your poison. Offense or defense. Never both.

name: Burst Window
abilityText: Play 1 additional card this turn.
flavor: Time dilates. You move twice. They blink once.

name: Lag Injection
abilityText: Enemy acts last next turn.
flavor: Inject 200ms of latency into their command chain. An eternity in combat.

name: Echo Shot
abilityText: Replay your last Weapon card at -2 damage.
flavor: The echo hits almost as hard as the original.

name: Queued Command
abilityText: Store 1 card from hand. It auto-plays free next turn.
flavor: Set it. Forget it. Let the autopilot deliver.

name: Rate Limiter
abilityText: Enemy can only play 1 Weapon next turn.
flavor: Throttle their fire rate. Watch them choke.

name: Signal Scramble
abilityText: Enemy draws 1 fewer card next turn.
flavor: Less intel. Less options. Less hope.

name: Wide Spectrum Jam
abilityText: All enemy cards cost +1 next turn.
flavor: Every system stutters. Every command costs more.

name: Micro-Swarm
abilityText: Deploy 5 micro-drones with Hot Deploy: 1 damage each/turn for 4 turns. +1/turn growth.
flavor: A cloud of teeth that learns.

name: Detonate Drone
abilityText: Consume 1 active drone. Deal 12 damage to all enemies.
flavor: It lived to serve. It died to destroy.

name: Firmware Patch
abilityText: Target active drone gains +3 damage per tick and +1 turn duration.
flavor: Version 2.0. Now with teeth.

name: Drone Controller
abilityText: This turn, all newly deployed drones gain Hot Deploy and Twin Barrels on first turn.
flavor: Double the output. Same deployment cost.

name: Hangar Pod
abilityText: Every 2 turns, spawn a Gun Drone with Hot Deploy (4 damage/turn, 2 turns). Lasts 6 turns.
flavor: An endless supply of problems for your enemy.

name: Fleet Sync
abilityText: All active drones gain +1 damage per tick this combat.
flavor: Synchronized firing solutions. Every drone hits harder.

name: Swarm Intelligence
abilityText: Your Weapons deal +1 damage for each active drone.
flavor: The swarm sees. The swarm shares. The swarm aims.

name: Sleeper Drone
abilityText: Cold Boot. Deploy facedown. Reveals next turn as Gun Drone (4 damage, 3 turns).
flavor: It waits. It listens. It wakes up angry.

name: Emergency Swarm
abilityText: Summon 3 Decoy Drones (1 HP each, absorb 1 hit each).
flavor: Quantity has a quality all its own.

name: Decoy Flare Token
abilityText: Place a bluff token on the field. Enemy must guess: real drone or decoy. If they attack it, waste their action.
flavor: Is it a drone? Is it a decoy? Only one way to find out.

name: The Hive Mind
abilityText: Summon 3 Echo Drones. Each copies every Weapon you play at half damage for 3 turns. Once per game. Exhaust.
flavor: They don't just follow orders. They echo them. Endlessly.

name: EMP Net
abilityText: Critical Breach — Destroy 1 enemy drone.
flavor: One pulse. One less problem.

name: Cycle Systems
abilityText: Discard 1. Draw 2.
flavor: Flush the cache. Load fresh data.

name: Telemetry Leak
abilityText: Reveal enemy's next 2 actions.
flavor: Their comms are leaking. Everything they plan, you see.

name: Power Drain
abilityText: Enemy loses 1 energy next turn.
flavor: Somewhere in their reactor, a valve just closed.

name: System Shutdown
abilityText: Disable 1 enemy Weapon card next turn. They cannot play Weapons.
flavor: Hard kill on their weapons bus. Total blackout.

name: Signal Spoof
abilityText: Enemy's next attack targets their own drone instead.
flavor: Friendly fire isn't. But they don't know that yet.

name: Trace Protocol
abilityText: Spend 2 energy. If you have more remaining energy than enemy, apply Jam and Lock.
flavor: Outspend them on the digital battlefield. Winner takes all.

name: Weapons Hot
abilityText: Passive: After playing 3 Weapon cards this combat, gain Overcharge.
flavor: Heat builds. Power builds. Everything builds to the kill shot.

name: Fortress Logic
abilityText: If your Block is over 20, deal 6 damage to attacker when hit.
flavor: The best walls hit back.

name: Intel Cascade
abilityText: After drawing/scanning this turn, next Weapon gets +4 damage.
flavor: Knowledge is power. In this case, literally.

name: Scrap Synergy
abilityText: Whenever you spend Scrap this combat, draw 1.
flavor: Every piece of salvage has a lesson inside.

name: ECM Feedback
abilityText: Whenever you apply a status effect this combat, gain 2 Block.
flavor: Control isn't just offense. It's armor.

name: Rapid Fire Logic
abilityText: Each 0-1 cost card played this turn adds +1 damage to your next Weapon.
flavor: Speed over power. Volume over precision.

name: Power Surge Protocol
abilityText: If you have 3+ Overcharge, your next 5+ cost card costs 3 instead.
flavor: Maximum charge reached. Deploy the big guns.

name: Targeting Core
abilityText: All Weapon cards deal +2 damage this combat.
flavor: Permanent targeting upgrade. Every shot counts more.

name: Weapon Router
abilityText: Whenever you play a Weapon card this combat, gain 2 Block.
flavor: Fire a shot, raise a shield. Rhythm of combat.

name: Heat Sink Protocol
abilityText: After playing 3 Weapons in a combat, gain Overcharge automatically.
flavor: Let the heat build. Then weaponize it.

name: ECM Suite
abilityText: When you apply Jam or Lock this combat, gain 1 energy next turn.
flavor: Every disruption pays dividends.

name: System Restore
abilityText: Return the last card you played to your hand.
flavor: Ctrl+Z. The most powerful command in any system.

name: Archive Recall
abilityText: Return 1 card from your discard pile to your hand.
flavor: The archive remembers. The archive delivers.

name: Preload Sequence
abilityText: Choose a card from your discard. Place it on top of your deck.
flavor: Next draw. Guaranteed.

name: Recycle Protocol
abilityText: Shuffle 1 card from your discard pile into your deck.
flavor: Nothing is truly gone. Just waiting for its next cycle.

name: Hard Burn
abilityText: Exhaust 1 card from your hand permanently. Gain 2 energy.
flavor: Sacrifice a tool. Gain the power to use what remains.

name: Archive Echo
abilityText: Play a copy of any card from your discard pile. Then exhaust that card permanently.
flavor: One more time. Just one more time. Then it's gone.

name: The Founder's Key
abilityText: Draw 5. Gain 3 energy. Heal 10. Once per game. Exhaust.
flavor: A key to everything voidexa was built upon. It opens all doors. Once.

name: Dome Protocol
abilityText: PvP: Both reveal simultaneously. Higher initiative gains Priority Fire.
flavor: In the Dome, timing is everything.

name: Load Rack
abilityText: Gain 2 Ammo tokens. Exhaust.
flavor: Rack 'em up. You'll need every round.

name: Emergency Reload
abilityText: Spend 2 energy. Gain 3 Ammo tokens. Exhaust.
flavor: Divert power to munitions. Everything else can wait.

name: Tow Beacon
abilityText: Tow speed +30% this mission. Exhaust.
flavor: Help is closer than you think. If you can afford it.

name: Legal Lock
abilityText: Extend wreck protected timer by 5 minutes. Exhaust.
flavor: Filed. Stamped. Legally yours for five more minutes.

name: Defrag Routine
abilityText: Remove 2 Noise cards from your deck. Exhaust.
flavor: Clean the signal. Remove the garbage.

name: Jettison
abilityText: After this encounter, permanently remove 1 card from your deck. Exhaust.
flavor: Eject the dead weight. Travel lighter.

name: Refit Module
abilityText: Choose 1 Weapon in your deck. It permanently gains +3 damage. Exhaust.
flavor: Better parts. Better performance. Permanent.

name: Recode Chip
abilityText: Transform 1 card in your deck into a random card of higher rarity. Exhaust.
flavor: What was common becomes uncommon. What was good becomes great.

name: Print Routine
abilityText: Add a copy of a chosen 1-cost card to your deck. Exhaust.
flavor: Good code deserves to be duplicated.

name: Flash Routine
abilityText: Add a temporary 0-cost Evade card to your hand (this combat only). Exhaust.
flavor: Emergency protocol. Temporary. Disposable. Life-saving.

name: Buffer Burst
abilityText: +2 hand limit this combat. Exhaust.
flavor: More memory. More options. More power.

name: Chaff Packet
abilityText: Add 2 Noise cards to enemy deck. Exhaust.
flavor: Garbage data, special delivery.

name: Emergency Reroute
abilityText: Discard your hand. Draw the same number of cards. Exhaust.
flavor: Bad hand? New hand. Don't question it.

name: Amplifier Cell
abilityText: All Weapons deal +3 damage this turn. Exhaust.
flavor: One cell. Three extra damage on everything. Worth it.

name: Servo Disruptor
abilityText: Enemy Weapons deal -2 damage this turn. Exhaust.
flavor: Slow their servos. Dull their edge.

name: Armor Strip Charge
abilityText: Enemy gains 3 less Block from each source this turn. Exhaust.
flavor: Erode the armor. Deny the protection.

name: Critical Lock Cell
abilityText: Next Weapon card deals double damage. Exhaust.
flavor: Window open. Take the shot.

name: Quantum Splice
abilityText: Copy any card from opponent's hand and play it for free. Once per game. Exhaust.
flavor: Their best card. In your hands. Their worst nightmare.

name: Docking Window
abilityText: Heal 10 hull between fights. Exhaust.
flavor: Five minutes in dock. A lifetime of extra hull.

name: Rescue Beacon
abilityText: Increase tow availability by 2 for this run. Exhaust.
flavor: Someone will come. Eventually. Probably.

name: Nebula Fog
abilityText: All Weapons deal -20% damage unless target is Locked. Lasts 3 turns.
flavor: The fog rolls in. Only precision cuts through.

name: Asteroid Field
abilityText: For 2 turns, ships without Evade take 3 damage at end of turn.
flavor: Rocks don't care about your shields. Only your reflexes.

name: Ion Storm
abilityText: For 3 turns: all statuses last +1 turn, energy gain -1.
flavor: The storm amplifies everything wrong and diminishes everything right.

name: Gravity Well
abilityText: For 2 turns, all Maneuver cards cost +1.
flavor: The gravity here drags at everything. Even thought.

name: Derelict Debris Field
abilityText: For 3 turns, gain +1 extra Scrap on each kill.
flavor: A graveyard of ships. A goldmine of salvage.

name: Signal Blackout
abilityText: For 3 turns: draw effects -1, but Scan/reveal effects doubled.
flavor: The noise dies. The signal sharpens.

name: Solar Flare
abilityText: For 2 turns, all ships lose 3 Block at end of turn.
flavor: The star screams. Shields melt.

name: Quantum Rift
abilityText: For 3 turns, the first card played each turn is duplicated.
flavor: Reality stutters. Everything happens twice.

name: Ammo Rack
abilityText: Gain 1 Ammo token every 2 turns this combat.
flavor: Steady supply. Steady fire.

name: Missile Guidance
abilityText: All missile/torpedo Weapons gain Tracking Lock, apply Lock, ignore Evade.
flavor: Once locked, there is no escape.

name: Rail Capacitor
abilityText: First Weapon card each turn deals +4 damage.
flavor: The first shot is always free. And devastating.

name: Heat Sink Module
abilityText: After playing 3 Weapons, remove any Overheat effects.
flavor: Vent heat. Keep firing.

name: Repair Bay
abilityText: Heal 5 hull after this combat ends.
flavor: Walk in broken. Walk out patched.

name: Salvage Rig
abilityText: After combat, gain Scrap equal to total damage dealt / 20.
flavor: Everything destroyed has value. If you know where to look.

name: Quantum Relay
abilityText: The first card you play each combat is duplicated (played twice).
flavor: The relay echoes your opening move. Make it count.

name: Memory Pin
abilityText: Choose 1 card in your hand. It is retained (not discarded) at end of turn.
flavor: Pin it to memory. Keep it for when you need it most.

name: Risk Rider
abilityText: Mission payout +30%. Start combat with Burn. Exhaust.
flavor: High risk, high reward. The void respects boldness.

name: Insurance Clause
abilityText: Wreck claim fee -20%. Mission payout -10%. Exhaust.
flavor: Play it safe. The paperwork pays for itself.

name: Tow Voucher
abilityText: Gain 1 free tow token. Exhaust.
flavor: Good for one rescue. No questions asked.

name: Cargo Stabilizer
abilityText: Hauling missions: collision penalties reduced 50%. Exhaust.
flavor: Bumps happen. This makes them cheaper.

name: Race Sponsor
abilityText: Speed run bonus: +50 GHAI if you finish in top 10%. Exhaust.
flavor: Someone's betting on you. Don't disappoint.

name: Reputation First
abilityText: Mission: -30 GHAI payout, +2 reputation gain. Exhaust.
flavor: Money comes and goes. Reputation compounds.

name: Black Market Deal
abilityText: Mission: +80 GHAI payout. Add 2 Noise cards to your deck. Exhaust.
flavor: The payout is great. The side effects... less so.

name: Power Contest
abilityText: PvP: Compare total card power played this turn. Winner draws 2.
flavor: Stronger hand wins. Simple as gravity.

name: Arena Modifier
abilityText: Set arena location: +1 energy gain for 2 turns.
flavor: Home field advantage. Choose your ground wisely.

name: Data Cache
abilityText: Store 1 card outside your deck for this run. Retrieve it at any shop. Exhaust.
flavor: Banked. Backed up. Safe.

name: Long-Range Scan
abilityText: Reveal the next 2 nodes on your PvE path. Exhaust.
flavor: Know what's ahead. Choose the better route.

name: Supply Credit
abilityText: Shop prices -20% for this run. Exhaust.
flavor: A voucher from a grateful merchant. Spend wisely.

name: Silent Running
abilityText: Random encounter chance -30% while hauling. Exhaust.
flavor: Engines low. Signatures hidden. Ghosts don't get stopped.

name: Null Ray
abilityText: Deal 6 damage. Disable 1 enemy module for 1 turn.
flavor: A targeted pulse that makes hardware forget what it does.

name: Intent Scanner
abilityText: Reveal boss hidden intent for this turn.
flavor: Decrypt. Decode. Don't die.

name: Counter Clamp
abilityText: Prevent the next card-steal effect. Gain 5 Block.
flavor: They reach for your cards. You slap their hand.

name: Event Horizon
abilityText: All enemies skip their next turn. Once per game. Exhaust.
flavor: Beyond the horizon, time stops. And so do they.

name: Scrapline Reclaimer
abilityText: System Reboot — When destroyed, return to bay with Cold Boot.

name: Lazarus Swarm Node
abilityText: System Reboot — When friendly drone destroyed, pay 1 to return with Cold Boot.

name: Dockborn Interceptor
abilityText: Cold Boot. On enter, gain 1 shield.

name: Assembly-Line Siege Pod
abilityText: Cold Boot. After boot, +1 attack this turn.

name: Redline Breacher
abilityText: Hot Deploy. May attack immediately.

name: Burnwake Assault Rack
abilityText: Drones deployed this turn have Hot Deploy.

name: Vector Duelist
abilityText: Priority Fire. Deals damage before opponent.

name: Sentinel Mark-IV
abilityText: Priority Fire. If destroys before return fire, prevent return damage.

name: Mass Driver Colossus
abilityText: Cascade. Excess drone damage hits hull.

name: Breachline Torpedo Bus
abilityText: Cascade. Excess damage to damaged drone hits hull.

name: Stratos Relay Kite
abilityText: High Orbit. Draw 1 on hull damage.

name: Orbital Lance Platform
abilityText: High Orbit. Long-range +1 hull damage.

name: Skyhook Flak Drone
abilityText: Tracking Lock. +1 vs High Orbit.

name: Predictive Aegis Grid
abilityText: All friendlies gain Tracking Lock. Draw 1 if enemy has High Orbit.

name: Needlefang Hunter
abilityText: Critical Breach. Any damage destroys drones.

name: Blacksite Sever Pod
abilityText: Critical Breach. On hull damage, disable 1 enemy module.

name: Patchwork Bastion
abilityText: Auto-Repair Protocol. First destruction prevented, engage instead.

name: Self-Mending Bulwark
abilityText: Auto-Repair Protocol. On survival, repair 2 hull.

name: Leechray Skimmer
abilityText: Hull Siphon. Damage dealt repairs your hull.

name: Reclamation Harvester
abilityText: Hull Siphon. On drone damage, gain 1 energy next turn.

name: Watchline Custodian
abilityText: Persistent Systems. No engage on attack.

name: Everwake Patrol Spine
abilityText: Persistent Systems. Unengaged adjacent drones +1 defense.

name: Ghostglass Scout
abilityText: Stealth Coating. Cannot be targeted by ECM.

name: Phantom Mesh Array
abilityText: Drones deployed this turn gain Stealth Coating.

name: Adamant Siege Engine
abilityText: Hardened Core. Cannot be destroyed by damage.

name: Corevault Guardian
abilityText: Hardened Core. Enemy modules cost +1 targeting your board.

name: Rapid Bay Interceptor
abilityText: Emergency Launch. Deploy during opponent's attack.

name: Ambush Deployment Net
abilityText: Emergency Launch. On enemy attack, deploy drone cost 2 or less.

name: Dualcoil Pursuer
abilityText: Twin Barrels. Deals damage twice.

name: Barrage Widow
abilityText: Twin Barrels. Both hits apply separately to hull.

name: Graveyard Sync Core
abilityText: Once per turn, first friendly drone destroyed gains System Reboot.

name: Burngate Commander
abilityText: Drones cost 3 or less have Hot Deploy.

name: Surgical Kill Mesh
abilityText: Drones with attack 1 gain Critical Breach.

name: Overclocked Gunbrain
abilityText: Next drone deployed gains Twin Barrels this turn.

name: Crisis Hangar AI
abilityText: Each opponent turn, first drone deployed gains Emergency Launch, costs 1 less.
